title: ebenus pavonii
intro: Ebenus pavonii, also known as the Purple Cornflower or Pansy Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and reducing fever. The health benefits of Ebenus pavonii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Ebenus pavonii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
